description_long: This guard rail consists of a horizontal rectangular frame with evenly spaced vertical bars, all constructed from what appears to be dark, painted metal. The main rail is supported at one end by a thick, square post that is wider than the vertical bars and features a base plate for mounting. The vertical bars are slender and uniformly distributed, providing a strong visual and physical barrier. The finish is matte to semi-gloss, with a slightly rough texture, suggesting durability for outdoor urban environments. The ends of the rail are blunt, with no visible flaring or energy-absorbing features. There are no reflective markings or additional safety features visible on the surface.
description: A dark metal guard rail with evenly spaced vertical bars and a thick end post, finished in a matte to semi-gloss texture.
description_view_0: The guard rail is seen from the side, showing the full length of the horizontal rail and all vertical bars, with the thick end post visible on the right.
description_view_1: A narrow end-on view, highlighting the thickness of the end post and the slim profile of the rail.
description_view_2: A top-down view, displaying the rectangular arrangement of the bars and the width of the end post.
description_view_3: A view from the opposite end, showing the alignment of the vertical bars and the base plate of the end post.
